title: ANC - Switch from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode
scenario: Verify that switching from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode correctly sets ANC to ON with its previous value, turns Transparency OFF with its previous value, and disables/greys out both settings.
steps: Launch the app with an ANC-supported device.
expected: ANC is set to ON with the previously selected value; Transparency switches to OFF with its previously selected value (Environment or Speech) and both values are disabled/greyed out.
